title: Einstein Manifolds
source_method: rendered image-page TOC inspection; text extraction is image-only

units.title: Introduction
units.focus: Definitions, motivation, existence, examples, moduli, Ricci curvature feel, and current problems.
units.label: Chapter 0

units.title: Basic Material
units.focus: Connections, pseudo-Riemannian manifolds, Killing fields, Einstein manifolds, curvature decompositions, Laplacians, conformal change, and variations.
units.label: Chapter 1

units.title: Basic Material Continued: Kahler Manifolds
units.focus: Complex manifolds, Hermitian and Kahler metrics, Ricci form, Chern classes, Hodge theory, and Calabi-Futaki theorem.
units.label: Chapter 2

units.title: Relativity
units.focus: Einstein field equation, tidal stresses, curvature normal forms, Schwarzschild metric, orbits, light bending, Kruskal extension, and singularity theorems.
units.label: Chapter 3

units.title: Riemannian Functionals
units.focus: Total scalar curvature, constant scalar curvature metrics, scalar curvature map, quadratic functionals, and variational properties.
units.label: Chapter 4

units.title: Ricci Curvature as a Partial Differential Equation
units.focus: Pointwise solvability, local obstructions, local Einstein metric construction, regularity, analyticity, and uniqueness and nonexistence.
units.label: Chapter 5

units.title: Einstein Manifolds and Topology
units.focus: Dimension two, three and four cases, fundamental group, spinorial obstruction, and Cheeger-Gromoll theorem.
units.label: Chapter 6

units.title: Homogeneous Riemannian Manifolds
units.focus: Homogeneous metrics, curvature, homogeneous Einstein examples, symmetric spaces, and standard homogeneous models.
units.label: Chapter 7

units.title: Compact Homogeneous Kahler Manifolds
units.focus: Adjoint orbits, canonical complex structures, invariant Ricci forms, KKS symplectic forms, Kahler metrics, and examples.
units.label: Chapter 8

units.title: Riemannian Submersions
units.focus: ONeill tensors, curvature formulas, canonical variation, homogeneous Einstein applications, warped products, and examples.
units.label: Chapter 9

units.title: Holonomy Groups
units.focus: Definitions, parallel tensors, products, curvature, symmetric spaces, Berger-style structure, nonsimply connected cases, and Lorentzian manifolds.
units.label: Chapter 10

units.title: Kahler-Einstein Metrics and the Calabi Conjecture
units.focus: Kahler-Einstein metrics, Aubin-Calabi-Yau theorems, positive first Chern class, and extremal metrics.
units.label: Chapter 11

units.title: The Moduli Space of Einstein Structures
units.focus: Surfaces, flat manifolds, infinitesimal deformations, formal integrability, premoduli spaces, Einstein constants, rigidity, and K3 examples.
units.label: Chapter 12

units.title: Self-Duality
units.focus: Self-dual four-manifolds, half-conformally flat manifolds, Penrose construction, reverse Penrose construction, and Einstein applications.
units.label: Chapter 13

units.title: Quaternion-Kahler Manifolds
units.focus: Hyperkahler manifolds, quaternion-Kahler structures, twistor spaces, symmetric examples, and applications.
units.label: Chapter 14

units.title: A Report on the Non-Compact Case
units.focus: Nonhomogeneous Einstein metrics, bundle constructions, and bounded domains of holomorphy.
units.label: Chapter 15

units.title: Generalizations of the Einstein Condition
units.focus: Natural linear conditions on covariant derivatives of Ricci tensors, Codazzi tensors, harmonic Weyl tensor, and harmonic curvature.
units.label: Chapter 16

units.title: Sobolev Spaces and Elliptic Operators
units.focus: Holder spaces, Sobolev spaces, embedding theorems, elliptic operators, adjoints, symbols, estimates, and regularity.
units.label: Appendix A

units.title: Addendum
units.focus: Later examples: infinitely many Einstein constants, G2 and Spin(7) holonomy metrics, and inhomogeneous Kahler-Einstein metrics.
units.label: Addendum
